title: bupleurum acutifolium
intro: Bupleurum acutifolium, also known as Chinese thorowax or acute-leaved hare's ear, is a plant species within the genus Bupleurum and is commonly found in China. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum acutifolium include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu, and supporting liver and immune system function. Bupleurum acutifolium is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its dried roots and rhizomes are used in herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine.
